query:
UPDATE queue_jobs
             SET locked_at = now(),
                 lease_version = lease_version + 1,
                 updated_at = now()
             WHERE id = $1
               AND status = 'running'
               AND locked_by = $2
               AND lease_version = $3
             RETURNING id,
                       payload AS "payload!: serde_json::Value",
                       attempts,
                       locked_at AS "locked_at!: DateTime<Utc>",
                       lease_version
